kavit passary ke baare me batao and perf.sql:
SELECT
    doer."Doer_Name",
    doer."source",
    doer."Total_Tasks",
    doer."Completed_Tasks",
    doer."Pending_Tasks",
    ROUND(
        CASE WHEN doer."Total_Tasks" > 0 THEN (doer."Completed_Tasks"::decimal / doer."Total_Tasks") * 100 ELSE 0 END
    ,2) AS "Completion_Percentage"
FROM (
    SELECT
        INITCAP(MAX("Doer_Name")) AS "Doer_Name",
        'Delegation'::text AS source,
        COUNT(*) AS "Total_Tasks",
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ("Status" ILIKE 'done' OR "Status" ILIKE 'completed' OR "Status" ILIKE 'yes')) AS "Completed_Tasks",
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ("Status" IS NULL OR TRIM("Status") = '' OR ("Status" NOT ILIKE 'done' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'completed' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'yes'))) AS "Pending_Tasks"
    FROM "Delegation"
    WHERE LOWER("Doer_Name") IN ('kavit passary', 'ahitesh tandan')
    GROUP BY LOWER("Doer_Name")
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        INITCAP(MAX("Doer_Name")) AS "Doer_Name",
        'Checklist'::text AS source,
        COUNT(*) AS "Total_Tasks",
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ("Status" ILIKE 'done' OR "Status" ILIKE 'completed' OR "Status" ILIKE 'yes')) AS "Completed_Tasks",
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ("Status" IS NULL OR TRIM("Status") = '' OR ("Status" NOT ILIKE 'done' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'completed' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'yes'))) AS "Pending_Tasks"
    FROM "Checklist"
    WHERE LOWER("Doer_Name") IN ('kavit passary', 'ahitesh tandan')
    GROUP BY LOWER("Doer_Name")
) doer
ORDER BY doer."Doer_Name", doer."source";

performance report of ahitesh.sql:
SELECT 
  INITCAP(MAX("Doer_Name")) AS "Doer_Name",
  source,
  COUNT(*) AS "Total_Tasks",
  SUM(CASE WHEN ("Status" ILIKE 'done' OR "Status" ILIKE 'completed' OR "Status" ILIKE 'yes') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Completed_Tasks",
  SUM(CASE WHEN ("Status" IS NULL OR TRIM("Status") = '' OR ("Status" NOT ILIKE 'done' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'completed' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'yes')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Pending_Tasks",
  ROUND(
    100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ("Status" ILIKE 'done' OR "Status" ILIKE 'completed' OR "Status" ILIKE 'yes') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)
  ,2) AS "Completion_Percentage"
FROM (
  SELECT "Doer_Name", "Status", 'Delegation'::text AS source
    FROM "Delegation"
    WHERE LOWER("Doer_Name") = 'ahitesh tandan'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Doer_Name", "Status", 'Checklist'::text AS source
    FROM "Checklist"
    WHERE LOWER("Doer_Name") = 'ahitesh tandan'
) t
GROUP BY source
ORDER BY source;

pending tasks of the ahitesh tantan.sql:
SELECT source, "Doer_Name", "Task_Description", "Planned_Date", "Task_Start_Date", "Status"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        'Delegation'::text AS source,
        "Doer_Name",
        "Task_Description",
        "Planned_Date",
        "Task_Start_Date",
        "Status"
    FROM "Delegation"
    WHERE 
        LOWER("Doer_Name") = LOWER('Ahitesh tantan')
        AND (
            "Status" IS NULL OR TRIM("Status") = '' OR 
            ("Status" NOT ILIKE 'done' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'completed' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'yes')
        )
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        'Checklist'::text AS source,
        "Doer_Name",
        "Task_Description",
        NULL::date AS "Planned_Date",
        "Task_Start_Date",
        "Status"
    FROM "Checklist"
    WHERE 
        LOWER("Doer_Name") = LOWER('Ahitesh tantan')
        AND (
            "Status" IS NULL OR TRIM("Status") = '' OR 
            ("Status" NOT ILIKE 'done' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'completed' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'yes')
        )
        AND "Task_Start_Date" <= CURRENT_DATE
) AS pending_tasks
ORDER BY "Task_Start_Date" DESC;

    COUNT(CASE WHEN ("Status" IS NULL OR TRIM("Status") = '' OR ("Status" NOT ILIKE 'done' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'completed' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'yes')) THEN 1 END) AS total_pending,

    'Checklist'::text AS source,

    COUNT(CASE WHEN ("Status" ILIKE 'done' OR "Status" ILIKE 'completed' OR "Status" ILIKE 'yes') THEN 1 END) AS total_completed,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ("Status" IS NULL OR TRIM("Status") = '' OR ("Status" NOT ILIKE 'done' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'completed' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'yes')) THEN 1 END) AS total_pending,
    INITCAP(MAX("Given_By")) AS "Doer_Name"
FROM "Checklist"
WHERE LOWER("Given_By") = LOWER('kavit passary')

list of the emmployees who have done thi.sql:
SELECT source, "Doer_Name", "Task_Description", "Actual", "Task_Start_Date"
FROM (
    SELECT 'Delegation'::text AS source, "Doer_Name", "Task_Description", "Actual", "Planned_Date" AS "Task_Start_Date"
    FROM "Delegation"
    WHERE ("Status" ILIKE 'done' OR "Status" ILIKE 'completed' OR "Status" ILIKE 'yes')
      AND "Actual" IS NOT NULL
      AND "Planned_Date" IS NOT NULL
      AND "Actual" <= "Planned_Date"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Checklist'::text AS source, "Doer_Name", "Task_Description", "Actual", "Task_Start_Date"
    FROM "Checklist"
    WHERE ("Status" ILIKE 'done' OR "Status" ILIKE 'completed' OR "Status" ILIKE 'yes')
      AND "Actual" IS NOT NULL
      AND "Task_Start_Date" IS NOT NULL
      AND "Actual" <= "Task_Start_Date"
) AS completed_on_time
ORDER BY "Doer_Name", "Task_Start_Date";

ahetesh ka performance report and kavit.sql:
SELECT
    doer,
    total_tasks,
    tasks_done,
    tasks_pending,
    ROUND(100.0 * tasks_done / NULLIF(total_tasks,0),2) AS completion_percent,
    tasks_ontime,
    ROUND(100.0 * tasks_ontime / NULLIF(tasks_done,0),2) AS ontime_percent
FROM (
    SELECT
        doer,
        COUNT(*) AS total_tasks,
        SUM(CASE WHEN status_done THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tasks_done,
        SUM(CASE WHEN NOT status_done THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tasks_pending,
        SUM(CASE WHEN status_done AND on_time THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tasks_ontime
    FROM (
        SELECT
            INITCAP("Doer_Name") AS doer,
            "Status" ILIKE 'done' OR "Status" ILIKE 'completed' OR "Status" ILIKE 'yes' AS status_done,
            CASE
                WHEN source = 'Delegation' THEN
                    ("Actual" IS NOT NULL AND "Planned_Date" IS NOT NULL AND "Actual" <= "Planned_Date")
                WHEN source = 'Checklist' THEN
                    ("Actual" IS NOT NULL AND "Task_Start_Date" IS NOT NULL AND "Actual" <= "Task_Start_Date")
                ELSE FALSE
            END AS on_time
        FROM (
            SELECT 'Delegation'::text AS source, "Doer_Name", "Status", "Actual", "Planned_Date"
            FROM "Delegation"
            WHERE LOWER("Doer_Name") IN ('ahitesh tandan', 'kavit passary')
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 'Checklist'::text AS source, "Doer_Name", "Status", "Actual", "Task_Start_Date" AS "Planned_Date"
            FROM "Checklist"
            WHERE LOWER("Doer_Name") IN ('ahitesh tandan', 'kavit passary')
        ) t
    ) t2
    GROUP BY doer
) t3
ORDER BY doer;

ahitesh ka performance report and kavit.sql:
SELECT 
    doer,
    total_tasks,
    completed_tasks,
    pending_tasks,
    on_time_tasks,
    late_tasks,
    ROUND(100.0 * completed_tasks / NULLIF(total_tasks,0),2) AS completion_rate_percent,
    ROUND(100.0 * on_time_tasks / NULLIF(completed_tasks,0),2) AS on_time_completion_percent
FROM (
    SELECT 
        doer,
        COUNT(*) AS total_tasks,
        SUM(CASE WHEN status_complete THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_tasks,
        SUM(CASE WHEN NOT status_complete THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_tasks,
        SUM(CASE WHEN status_complete AND on_time THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_tasks,
        SUM(CASE WHEN status_complete AND NOT on_time THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_tasks
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            INITCAP("Doer_Name") AS doer,
            "Task_Description",
            "Task_Start_Date",
            "Actual",
            "Status",
            -- Completed status
            (("Status" ILIKE 'done' OR "Status" ILIKE 'completed' OR "Status" ILIKE 'yes')) AS status_complete,
            -- On time: Actual date <= Task_Start_Date (for Checklist), Actual date <= Planned_Date (for Delegation)
            CASE 
                WHEN source = 'Checklist' THEN 
                    ("Actual" IS NOT NULL AND "Task_Start_Date" IS NOT NULL AND "Actual" <= "Task_Start_Date")
                WHEN source = 'Delegation' THEN 
                    ("Actual" IS NOT NULL AND "Planned_Date" IS NOT NULL AND "Actual" <= "Planned_Date")
                ELSE FALSE
            END AS on_time
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                'Checklist'::text AS source,
                "Doer_Name",
                "Task_Description",
                "Task_Start_Date",
                "Actual",
                "Status",
                NULL::date AS "Planned_Date"
            FROM "Checklist"
            WHERE LOWER("Doer_Name") IN ('ahitesh tandan', 'kavit passary')
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 
                'Delegation'::text AS source,
                "Doer_Name",
                "Task_Description",
                NULL::date AS "Task_Start_Date",
                "Actual",
                "Status",
                "Planned_Date"
            FROM "Delegation"
            WHERE LOWER("Doer_Name") IN ('ahitesh tandan', 'kavit passary')
        ) t
    ) t2
    GROUP BY doer
) t3
ORDER BY doer;

give me the performance report of the ah.sql:
SELECT
    INITCAP(MAX("Doer_Name")) AS "Doer_Name",
    COUNT(*) AS total_tasks,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ("Status" ILIKE 'done' OR "Status" ILIKE 'completed' OR "Status" ILIKE 'yes') THEN 1 END) AS total_completed,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ("Status" IS NULL OR TRIM("Status") = '' OR ("Status" NOT ILIKE 'done' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'completed' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'yes')) THEN 1 END) AS total_pending,
    MIN("Task_Start_Date") AS first_task_date,
    MAX("Task_Start_Date") AS last_task_date
FROM (
    SELECT "Doer_Name", "Status", "Task_Start_Date"
    FROM "Checklist"
    WHERE "Doer_Name" ILIKE '%ahitesh%'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "Doer_Name", "Status", "Task_Start_Date"
    FROM (
        SELECT "Doer_Name", "Status", "Task_Start_Date"
        FROM "Delegation"
        WHERE "Doer_Name" ILIKE '%ahitesh%'
    ) d
) t
GROUP BY LOWER("Doer_Name")

WITH all_tasks AS (
    SELECT
        INITCAP("Doer_Name") AS doer_name,
        "Task_Description",
        "Task_Start_Date" AS task_date,
        "Status",
        'Checklist'::text AS source
    FROM "Checklist"
    WHERE LOWER("Doer_Name") LIKE 'ahitesh%'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        INITCAP("Doer_Name") AS doer_name,
        "Task_Description",
        "Planned_Date" AS task_date,
        "Status",
        'Delegation'::text AS source
    FROM "Delegation"
    WHERE LOWER("Doer_Name") LIKE 'ahitesh%'
)
SELECT
    doer_name,
    COUNT(*) AS total_tasks,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Status" ILIKE 'done' OR "Status" ILIKE 'completed' OR "Status" ILIKE 'yes') AS total_completed,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Status" IS NULL OR TRIM("Status") = '' OR ("Status" NOT ILIKE 'done' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'completed' AND "Status" NOT ILIKE 'yes')) AS total_pending,
    MIN(task_date) AS first_task_date,
    MAX(task_date) AS last_task_date
FROM all_tasks
GROUP BY LOWER(doer_name), doer_name
ORDER BY doer_name;
